title: Why Data Engineering is critical in 2026
page_content: Data engineering has evolved massively by 2026. Instead of traditional ETL pipelines, we now rely entirely on AI-driven orchestration, automated schema evolution, and real-time streaming architectures. Vector databases allow real-time analysis of unstructured data, while BigQuery remains a dominant player for structured analytics.
first_line: Data engineering has evolved massively by 2026.
